name: Mediterranean Tofu Ragout
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Cup crimini or shiitake mushrooms, quartered
1 1/2 Cups fresh or canned diced tomatoes, in juice
1/4 cup Nicoise, kalamata or oil-cured olives
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a wok or non-stick skillet and gently stir fry the tofu until golden brown. Remove and set aside.
2. Heat the remaining oil and add the onions, mushrooms, and garlic. Sauté until crisp, tender, and lightly colored.
3. Add the artichokes, tomatoes, capers, and olives. Cook for 3-4 minutes until flavors come together.
4. Correct seasoning with salt and pepper.
5. Carefully stir in the tofu and serve immediately with steamed rice, freshly grated Parmesan, and fresh basil.
Yield: 4 servings
